items.title: West Asia war LIVE: U.S., Iran agree to halt attacks and hold talks in Doha this week, report says
items.summary: The two sides anticipate meeting ‌on June 30 ​in Doha, ⁠Axios report said, to work ‌out their dispute over the Strait of Hormuz

items.title: Mideast Live Updates: Dispute Over Strait Deepens as U.S. and Iran Trade Attacks
items.summary: In a fourth day of hostilities, Iran said that it had targeted a U.S. naval base in Bahrain and a Kuwaiti air base with drones and missiles. No major damage or casualties were r...

items.title: Ireland upstage world champions India to win T20 series at home
items.summary: Ireland won the second T20 by one run over India, who did not give a debut to teen sensation Sooryavanshi.
